claim: Ghent's official tourism site lists walking and nature routes accessible from the city centre, including circuits to Bourgoyen-Ossemeersen.
quote: Walking in nature: tips

claim: Bourgoyen-Ossemeersen nature reserve sits about 5 km from Ghent's city centre with bird-watching huts overlooking the marsh.
quote: This nature reserve is found 5km from Ghent city center, with mostly marsh and farmland.

claim: SUP and kayak rentals operate on Ghent's inner-city waterways via Dobber.
quote: Dobber - Stand-up paddleboarding & Kayaking

claim: Cycling Through Water in Bokrijk is a 200 m+ concrete trough through a pond at node 91, opened April 2016.
quote: more than 200 meters through a pond... at node 91 of the cycle node network

claim: Cycling Through the Trees in Bosland is a 700 m double-loop bridge that rises gradually to 10 m above the forest floor.
quote: double circle with a diameter of 100 meters and no less than 700 meters long, gradually rises (3-4%) to a height of 10 meters

claim: Hoge Kempen National Park has 440+ km of trails across 88 loop walks of 3–17 km, with 10 routes carrying the European 'Leading Quality Trails - Best of Europe, Day Walk' label.
quote: more than 440 km of hiking fun with no fewer than 88 loop-shaped walks of 3 km to 17 km

claim: Hoge Kempen is Belgium's first national park, in Limburg, ~12,000 ha of forest and heathland.
quote: Belgium's first national park... more than 12,000 hectares of forest and heathland

claim: Kayaking the Ourthe around Durbuy and the Lesse from Houyet are the two most popular Belgian Ardennes paddling routes.
quote: Where to go kayaking in the Ardennes?

claim: Lesse kayak tours start from ~€20/person; the river offers 12 or 21 km routes between Houyet and Anseremme/Dinant.
quote: From €20 / pers... 12 or 21 km

claim: Dinant Evasion runs two-seater kayaks from Gendron/Houyet to Anseremme; the 12 km route takes ~3 hours.
quote: super comfy one or two-seater kayak... 12 or 21 kms

claim: Bruges Ballooning runs a 1-hour sightseeing flight April–October with a champagne celebration on landing.
quote: guarantees a fantastic flight of at least 1 hour... champagne breakfast

claim: Bruges' tourism office calls hot-air balloon flights 'the most romantic and adventurous way to discover Bruges'.
quote: the most romantic and adventurous way to discover Bruges

claim: Hot-air balloon flights over Bruges/Belgium price at €160 pp for individual or duo bookings, all-inclusive (insurance, VAT, fuel).
quote: Individual or duo bookings: €160 per person... insurance, fuel surcharges, VAT, everything included

claim: Hiking in the High Fens is restricted to marked paths and kilometres of wooden footbridges over the protected peat bogs.
quote: only permitted along the marked paths and on the kilometre-long wooden footbridges

claim: The High Fens were declared a nature reserve in 1957; Signal de Botrange (694 m) is the highest point in Belgium.
quote: declared a nature reserve in 1957... reaches 694 metres above sea level

claim: Boardwalk loops from Mont Rigi/Baraque Michel are family- and stroller-friendly intros to the bog landscape.
quote: family-friendly and stroller-friendly walk over boardwalks

claim: Signal de Botrange and the High Fens are listed among Belgium's best-rated dark-sky stargazing spots.
quote: Signal de Botrange, the highest point in Belgium, is perfect for stargazing

claim: The Drielandenpunt where Belgium, Netherlands and Germany meet is rated 'Good for Couples' on Tripadvisor with free access to the border marker.
quote: Good for Couples

claim: The Vaalserberg is 322.5 m, the highest natural point in the European Netherlands, on the Dutch–Belgian–German tripoint.
quote: Vaalserberg, which at 322.5 meters is the highest natural point in the Netherlands

claim: The Flemish coast is 67 km of continuous beach and dunes from De Panne to Knokke-Heist.
quote: The Flemish coast: 67 kilometres of beach

claim: The North Sea Coast Cycle Route segment runs 75 km from Knokke to De Panne along the Belgian shore.
quote: 75 kilometers from Knokke to De Panne

claim: The Kusttram costs €2.50 for the full 67-stop De Panne–Knokke ride and takes a bit over two hours end-to-end.
quote: For €2.50, you can ride the full route... full route from Knokke coastal tram to De Panne taking just over two hours

claim: The Zwin Nature Park west of Knokke holds rare salt-marsh birdlife with trails through dunes and reeds; the Zoute dunes are walkable for quiet North Sea views.
quote: dunes behind Zoute Beach in Knokke-Heist are ideal for coastal walks... Het Zwin Nature Reserve... home to a variety of rare birds

claim: Late spring (May–June) is recommended for a Belgian-coast couples' walk: 12–20 °C and pre-peak crowds.
quote: best time to visit Knokke-Heist beach... May to June, with temperatures ranging from 12°C to 20°C

claim: Marche-les-Dames near Namur offers a guided 400 m via ferrata along the Meuse, accessible only on weekends due to the adjacent military zone.
quote: initial course is 400 meters... Access to the military zone is prohibited during the week

claim: Durbuy treehouses such as La Cabane Sauvage (6 m up, outdoor jacuzzi, ~€140/night) and Wooden Nest with infrared sauna are positioned as Ardennes couples' stays.
quote: La Cabane Sauvage Durbuy is perched 6 meters above the ground with an outdoor jacuzzi, available for €140 per night

claim: Many Ardennes self-catering chalets offer a private jacuzzi or sauna on the terrace, marketed for couples-only weekends.
quote: Many chalets have a private jacuzzi on the terrace, their own sauna or even a small spa area

claim: The Belgian Ardennes are pitched as a year-round couples' destination — summer for nature, autumn for colour, winter for cosy stays, spring for walks.
quote: in summer for nature activities, autumn for flamboyant colors, winter for a cozy atmosphere, and spring for walks

claim: Tulip Tours Holland's bike route around the bulb fields runs from 5 April to 5 May 2026 with peak bloom typically 13–25 April.
quote: tulip bike tour runs from April 5 to May 5, 2026... ideal window is 13–25 April

claim: Keukenhof opens 19 March and closes 10 May 2026.
quote: Keukenhof 2026 opens on 19 March and closes on 10 May

claim: The Kempen Trappist Route between Westmalle and Brecht is a 30 or 44 km loop linking abbeys, breweries, and the Trappisten café.
quote: base route of 44 km and a shortened route of 30 km... Trappist Abbey Westmalle

claim: Three Trappist breweries are in Flanders: Westvleteren, Achel and Westmalle.
quote: Three Trappist breweries are located in Flanders: Westvleteren, Achel and Westmalle

claim: Eifel National Park borders Belgium's east and is recommended for late-spring/early-autumn couples' hiking weekends with mild 13–18 °C weather.
quote: Late spring and early autumn are often recommended for exploring Eifel

claim: Eifel's Wilderness Trail (Wildnis-Trail) is split into 4 stages between Monschau and Höfen, suitable for a multi-day couples' trek.
quote: famous Wilderness Trail, which is divided into 4 stages and runs between Monschau and Höfen

claim: Sonian Forest covers ~4,000 ha on Brussels' southeast edge and is best visited in autumn (late September–October) for golden beech foliage.
quote: 4000-hectare reserve... Autumn (late September–October) is the second-best window: the beeches turn gold

claim: Sonian Forest is part of the UNESCO Ancient and Primeval Beech Forests World Heritage site (inscribed 2017); 70% of it is beech.
quote: 70% of the Sonian Forest is made up of beech forest

claim: BoatBikeTours offers 8-day Zeeland bike-and-boat itineraries with Saturday departures from 23 May to 13 June 2026, covering Walcheren beaches and storm-surge barriers.
quote: arrivals on Saturdays from May 23 to June 13, 2026

claim: Visit Flanders pitches Hoge Kempen as a micro-adventure park: bivouac sites, lakes for swimming, gravel trails for couples on weekends.
quote: Micro-adventures in Hoge Kempen National Park

claim: AllTrails lists 16+ scenic hiking and cycling trails directly accessible from Ghent.
quote: 16 scenic trails in the Ghent area

claim: Kluisbos (300 ha, ~50 km south of Ghent) and the Meetjesland farmland mosaic are quick-access nature pockets for Ghent residents.
quote: Kluisbos, partially a nature reserve, stretches out over 300 hectares... Meetjesland is probably one of the nicest areas close to Ghent

claim: Visit Flanders runs a dedicated cycling brand offering free GPX downloads of cycle node routes, bike rental info, and accommodation listings.
quote: Cycling in Flanders

claim: Pure Adventures' self-guided 'Flanders & Beer' bike tour is bookable any day from 1 May to mid-October 2026, starting at Hotel Harmony in central Ghent.
quote: starting any day from May 1st through mid-October... Hotel Harmony in the historic center of Ghent
